keys.description: The current-season ULID + summary for one scope tuple. Read by CurrentSeasonResolver on every `/seasons/current` request + by every enrollment surface that needs the active season. 5-minute TTL because it's high-traffic + the invariant flips are rare but audit-critical (missing an invalidation would return a stale current season for up to 5 minutes).

The full active-season list for one tenant. Read by the tenant admin UI + by the `season.resolve_active` middleware when validating an X-Season-Id header. Small payload (id, name, slug, status, is_current, scope tuple).
One Season row (full). Read by the SeasonPhaseCalculator + RegistrationWindowEvaluator on hot paths.

Cached phase evaluation for one Season (planned / registration_open / registration_closed / in_progress / playoffs / completed). Read by SeasonPhaseCalculator to avoid recomputing from scratch on every phase-adjacent request. Short 60-second TTL because phase can transition at hour boundaries.
invalidatedBy: SeasonObserver.updated (registration_opens_at / registration_closes_at / late_registration_ends_at / start_date / end_date / playoff_starts_at / playoff_ends_at changed)

keys.description: Precomputed registration-window state (is_open / opens_at / closes_at / late_ends_at / is_in_late_window). Read by the `season.enforce_registration_open` middleware on every Wave-3 enrollment-adjacent request. Short 60-second TTL to keep close to real-time.
Timestamp of the last successful ReconcileCurrentSeasonInvariantJob run. Read by the health probe + the ops dashboard.
The full `data/business-type-defaults.json` mapping. Static artifact — parsed once, cached indefinitely. Invalidated on deploy (the cache key includes a hash of the file).
